## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)

### Control Flow

- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %

- [x] For loops (with assignment)

- [x] Execute command (shorthand)

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

### Bytecode VM
- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

### Bitwise Operators

✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)

✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

### Bytecode VM
- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates

✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %

- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops

- [x] Execute command (shorthand)

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

### Bitwise Operators

✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %

### Control Flow

- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)

- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command

- [x] 30+ opcodes

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

### Bitwise Operators

✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)

✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %

- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

- [x] Execute command (shorthand)

- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command

- [x] 30+ opcodes

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

### Bytecode VM
- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates

✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %

- [x] For loops (with assignment)

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

```

```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %

- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion

- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command

- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command

- [x] 30+ opcodes

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates

✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %

- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops

- [x] Functions (typed parameters)

- [x] Execute command (shorthand)

- [x] Format command

- [x] 30+ opcodes

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support
```
✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators
✓ All bitwise operators
```

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion

- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command

- [x] 30+ opcodes

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode

### Operators (All 20+)

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)

✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)

### Operators (All 20+)

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

### Bitwise Operators
```

✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)

✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)

```

### Operators (All 20+)

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates

✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

### Bytecode VM
- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support
```
✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators
✓ All bitwise operators
```

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support
```
✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators
✓ All bitwise operators
```

### Significantly Enhanced Documents
1. **docs/wiki.md** - Completely rewritten with:
   - Modern language overview
   - 25+ working examples
   - Complete operators section
   - Bitwise operators detailed
   - Current status vs. planned features
   - Updated roadmap (v0.2-v0.5)

2. **docs/ARCHITECTURE.md** - Major overhaul:
   - Bytecode-first pipeline
   - VM architecture explained
   - 30+ opcodes documented
   - 12-level precedence hierarchy
   - Performance characteristics
   - .kbc format specification

3. **CONTRIBUTING.md** - Rewritten with:
   - Go-focused setup (removed Rust refs)
   - Development workflow
   - Testing guidelines
   - Contributing areas
   - Bytecode VM development guide
   - File organization

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

### Bytecode VM
- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

---

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

- ✅ cli.md (output examples)
- ✅ CLI_STYLING_GUIDE.md (comprehensive guide)
- ✅ CHANGELOG.md (listed as improvement)

- ✅ BYTECODE.md (documented)

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support
```
✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators
✓ All bitwise operators
```

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support
```
✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators
✓ All bitwise operators
```

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support
```
✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators
✓ All bitwise operators
```

### Operators (All 20+)

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support
```
✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators
✓ All bitwise operators
```

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !

- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

- [x] Functions (typed parameters)

- [x] Execute command (shorthand)

- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command

- [x] 30+ opcodes

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support
```
✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators
✓ All bitwise operators
```

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented

✓ Successfully built: program.kbc

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)

```

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented

```

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```

✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)

```

- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support
```
✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators
✓ All bitwise operators
```

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```

✓ Successfully built: program.kbc

### Colors Implemented

- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

### Bytecode VM
- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)

- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)

- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

### Bytecode VM
- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

### Bytecode VM
- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

---

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

- ✅ cli.md (output examples)

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support
```
✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators
✓ All bitwise operators
```

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

### Bytecode VM
- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %

- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

### Bytecode VM
- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

---

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

### Bitwise Operators

✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)

```

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

### Bytecode VM
- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

---

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support
```
✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators
✓ All bitwise operators
```

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

### Bytecode VM
- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support

✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators

### Operators (All 20+)

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

### Bytecode VM
- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

### Bitwise Operators

✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)

✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

### Bytecode VM
- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates

✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %

- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops

- [x] Execute command (shorthand)

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

### Bitwise Operators

✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %

### Control Flow

- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)

- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command

- [x] 30+ opcodes

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

### Bitwise Operators

✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)

✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %

- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

- [x] Execute command (shorthand)

- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command

- [x] 30+ opcodes

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

### Bytecode VM
- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates

✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %

- [x] For loops (with assignment)

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

```

```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %

- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion

- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command

- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command

- [x] 30+ opcodes

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates

✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %

- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops

- [x] Functions (typed parameters)

- [x] Execute command (shorthand)

- [x] Format command

- [x] 30+ opcodes

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support
```
✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators
✓ All bitwise operators
```

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion

- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command

- [x] 30+ opcodes

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode

### Operators (All 20+)

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)

✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)

### Operators (All 20+)

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

### Bitwise Operators
```

✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)

✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)

```

### Operators (All 20+)

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates

✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

### Bytecode VM
- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support
```
✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators
✓ All bitwise operators
```

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support
```
✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators
✓ All bitwise operators
```

### Significantly Enhanced Documents
1. **docs/wiki.md** - Completely rewritten with:
   - Modern language overview
   - 25+ working examples
   - Complete operators section
   - Bitwise operators detailed
   - Current status vs. planned features
   - Updated roadmap (v0.2-v0.5)

2. **docs/ARCHITECTURE.md** - Major overhaul:
   - Bytecode-first pipeline
   - VM architecture explained
   - 30+ opcodes documented
   - 12-level precedence hierarchy
   - Performance characteristics
   - .kbc format specification

3. **CONTRIBUTING.md** - Rewritten with:
   - Go-focused setup (removed Rust refs)
   - Development workflow
   - Testing guidelines
   - Contributing areas
   - Bytecode VM development guide
   - File organization

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !
- [x] Bitwise: &, |, ^, ~, <<, >> (ALL 6!)
- [x] Operator Precedence (12 levels)

### Control Flow
- [x] If-Else statements
- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

### Language Features
- [x] Variables & assignment
- [x] Functions (typed parameters)
- [x] Recursion
- [x] Built-in functions (print, input)

### CLI Features
- [x] Build command with options
- [x] Execute command (shorthand)
- [x] Run command
- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command
- [x] Colored output with symbols

### Bytecode VM
- [x] Stack-based architecture
- [x] 30+ opcodes
- [x] Bitwise instruction execution
- [x] Assignment statement compilation

---

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

- ✅ cli.md (output examples)
- ✅ CLI_STYLING_GUIDE.md (comprehensive guide)
- ✅ CHANGELOG.md (listed as improvement)

- ✅ BYTECODE.md (documented)

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support
```
✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators
✓ All bitwise operators
```

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support
```
✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators
✓ All bitwise operators
```

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support
```
✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators
✓ All bitwise operators
```

### Operators (All 20+)

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support
```
✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators
✓ All bitwise operators
```

## Features Documented ✅

### Operators (All 20+)
- [x] Arithmetic: +, -, *, /, %
- [x] Comparison: ==, !=, <, <=, >, >=
- [x] Logical: &&, ||, !

- [x] For loops (with assignment)
- [x] While loops
- [x] Break/Continue

- [x] Functions (typed parameters)

- [x] Execute command (shorthand)

- [x] Check command
- [x] Format command
- [x] Version command

- [x] 30+ opcodes

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented
```
✗ Error parsing file: Expected expression at {5 15}
✓ Successfully built: program.kbc
⏳ Building file: main.kode
```

## Test Results ✅

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support
```
✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators
✓ All bitwise operators
```

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented

✓ Successfully built: program.kbc

### Bitwise Operators
```
✓ 12 & 5 = 4 (AND)
✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)

```

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

### Examples Documented

```

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅

### Colors Implemented
- ✅ Red (`\033[1;31m`) for errors with ✗ symbol
- ✅ Cyan (`\033[1;36m`) for status with ⏳ symbol
- ✅ Yellow (`\033[1;33m`) for filenames
- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```

✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)

```

- ✅ Green (`\033[1;32m`) for success with ✓ symbol

✓ 12 | 5 = 13 (OR)
✓ 12 ^ 5 = 9 (XOR)
✓ 8 << 2 = 32 (LShift)
✓ 8 >> 2 = 2 (RShift)
✓ ~5 = -6 (NOT)
```

### CLI Commands
```
✓ kode build program.kode (creates .kbc)
✓ kode program.kbc (executes bytecode)
✓ kode program.kode (compile + execute)
✓ Build with --verbose flag works
✓ Build with -o custom output works
```

### Feature Support
```
✓ For loops with assignments
✓ While loops with state updates
✓ If-else conditionals
✓ Function calls with arguments
✓ Variable assignments
✓ Arithmetic operations
✓ All comparison operators
✓ All logical operators
✓ All bitwise operators
```

## CLI Styling Improvements ✅
